subcodes.first_line: I bear witness unto that which God did testify, before the appearance of all names, that verily there is none other God but Him, and He Who speaketh with truth is verily He [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان اشهد بما شهد الله قبل ظهور الاسماء انه لا اله الا هو و الذی ینطق بالحق انه
subcodes.subjects: @love of God, @power of prayer, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
